response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-04:18: Identified 'Katahane' via on-screen text and performer (Amane Kanata). 2. 04:18-05:00: Identified 'Tokusha Seizon Wonderladder!!' via on-screen text, with credits to Tabuchi Tomoya for lyrics and composition. 3. Searched for lyrics for both songs, finding confirmed lyrics for Wonderladder and using internal knowledge for Katahane. 4. Constructed the JSON according to the schema.
response.global_summary: A video featuring Amane Kanata's graduation concert, performing her original songs 'Katahane' and 'Tokusha Seizon Wonderladder!!'.

scenes.description: Amane Kanata performs her original song 'Katahane' on stage. The lyrics are displayed on-screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
あなたみたいになりたい
あなたみたいに空を飛びたい
あなたみたいになりたい
片羽でも

あなたのそばにいたい
あなたと同じ景色を見たい

もうこの手を離さない
もうこの温もりをなくさない

世界が変わっても
離れ離れになっても
私の心はずっとあなたのそばに

あなたみたいになりたい
あなたみたいに空を飛びたい
あなたみたいになりたい
片羽でも

ずっとずっとあなたのそばに
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I want to be like you
I want to be able to fly
I want to be like you
Even if I have only one wing

I want to be by your side
I want to see the same scenery as you

I won't let go of this hand anymore
I won't lose this warmness anymore

Even if the world changes
Even if we are separated
My heart will always be with you

I want to be like you
I want to be able to fly
I want to be like you
Even if I have only one wing

I will always, always be with you

scenes.description: Amane Kanata performs her original song 'Tokusha Seizon Wonderladder!!'. On-screen text credits Tabuchi Tomoya for lyrics and composition.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
なぬっ!? ビシッ おりゃっ! パシッ 
ツッコミも冴えて 本日快晴 
手にする全部 It’s mine! くれくれ 
適度にがんばろっか (そっか?) 
そんなんだっていいけどさ 
必死にがんばろっか (そうだ!) 
それが僕らしいよな 
才不是土掉渣啦! 
そんで貧乏っちい じゃねえんだわ! 
うん! 万事がパッチリ イケてるに決まってる! 
(are you?) かなたちゃん (are you?) 
どどん! 前進上等! 
ちゃんと歓迎して (wonder-la-der-la) 
高まれ 
海空創造 ちゃんと驚嘆して (wonder-la-der-la) 
興奮しよう 
僕が言うんだもん 本当にするんだもん 
現実超えろ未来 あー! 
弱点も平気 スイッチでランチャー! (wonder-la-der-la)
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
What!? Bam! Bam! Smash! 
My tsukkomi (comedic retort) is sharp today too, it's clear weather! 
Everything I get my hands on It’s mine! Gimme gimme!
Should I try working hard moderately? (Is that so?)
That's fine too, but
Should I try working hard desperately? (Yeah!)
That's more like me, isn't it?
It's not that I'm uncool!
It's not that I'm stingy either!
Yeah! Everything is perfect, it's bound to work out!
(are you?) Kanata-chan (are you?)
Boom! Advancement is the best!
Properly welcome me (wonder-la-der-la)
Raise the excitement! 
Create the ocean and sky, properly marvel at it (wonder-la-der-la)
Let's get excited!
Since I'm the one saying it, it's definitely gonna be real!
Surpass reality, the future, Ah!
My weakness is fine too, launcher with a switch! (wonder-la-der-la)
